description: This pipeline measures various aspects of image data, including spots, edges, and tracks, and outputs the results into tables for further analysis, ultimately providing a comprehensive output that combines these measurements.

007b91b8-f237-434a-9574-b5aa33b743f2.name: trackmate-measure-spots
007b91b8-f237-434a-9574-b5aa33b743f2.description: Measures the spots and outputs the results into a table. If tracked spots are provided, the track ID will also be added.

db41cbee-3f59-48ca-b195-9e6f14b622cd.name: trackmate-measure-edges
db41cbee-3f59-48ca-b195-9e6f14b622cd.description: Measures the edges and outputs the results into a table

d6119ca9-8bba-4e72-88dd-38c511a11886.name: trackmate-measure-tracks
d6119ca9-8bba-4e72-88dd-38c511a11886.description: Measures the tracks and outputs the results into a table
